text: Which of the following statements regarding primary battery cells used on board is correct?

options.text: Used primary cells must be discarded after use
Used primary cells can be fully recharged
Used primary cells can be refilled and reused

explanation: Primary battery cells are non-rechargeable electrochemical units. Once their chemical potential is depleted, they cannot be restored through charging or refilling and must be disposed of according to the ship's waste management plan.
